name: AIFlow
description: Visual workflow builder for AI automation. Drag-and-drop nodes to chain models, APIs, and data sources into production pipelines.

name: CodeFlow
description: Smart code review and refactoring tool. Analyze pull requests, suggest improvements, and auto-fix common issues across your codebase.

name: DataWise
description: Natural language data analysis. Upload CSV or connect databases, ask questions in plain language, get charts and insights instantly.

name: DeepChat
description: Multi-model chat interface with conversation branching, prompt templates, and team collaboration. Supports 20+ models through Ofox.

name: DocuBot
description: Chat with your documents. Upload PDFs, Word files, or Notion pages and get accurate answers with source citations.

name: PixelLab
description: AI-powered design tool for social media graphics, thumbnails, and banners. Generate and edit visuals with text prompts.

name: StudyMate AI
description: Adaptive learning companion that creates personalized study plans, generates practice questions, and explains concepts at your level.

name: WriteCraft
description: AI writing assistant for blogs, emails, and marketing copy. Supports tone adjustment, multi-language translation, and SEO optimization.
